Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.Configuration

Packages that use Configuration
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
 

Uses of Configuration in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol with parameters of type Configuration
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(Configuration<MediaGroup> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(Configuration<MediaGroup> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 MediaConfig MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(Configuration<?> configuration)
          Return an instance of predefined MediaConfig, as described by the given Configuration
 

Uses of Configuration in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as Configuration
static Configuration<MediaGroup> MediaGroup.PLAYER
          Defines a MediaGroupConfig containing only a Player interface.
static Configuration<MediaGroup> MediaGroup.PLAYER_RECORDER_SIGNALDETECTOR
          A MediaGroupConfig containing Player, Recorder, and SignalDetector.
static Configuration<MediaGroup> MediaGroup.PLAYER_RECORDER_SIGNALDETECTOR_SIGNALGENERATOR
          A MediaGroupConfig containing Player, Recorder, SignalDetector, and SignalGenerator.
static Configuration<MediaGroup> MediaGroup.PLAYER_SIGNALDETECTOR
          Defines a MediaGroupConfig containing a Player and a SignalDetector.
static Configuration<MediaGroup> MediaGroup.SIGNALDETECTOR
          Defines a MediaGroupConfig containing only a SignalDetector.
 

Uses of Configuration in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer declared as Configuration
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO
          This Configuration supports simple audio mixing.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_EVENTS
          This Configuration supports audio mixing, plus the events related to the active talkers.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO
          This Configuration support mixing of audio and video.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING
          This Configuration supports the features of MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO, plus a VideoRenderer.
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.DTMF_CLAMP
          This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer.
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.DTMFCLAMP_VOLUME
          This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer, and include a volume control.
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.EMPTY
          This config is a pass-through, no media processing is performed on any stream.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with parameters of type Configuration
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 

Uses of Configuration in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection declared as Configuration
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> NetworkConnection.BASIC
          This config contains only the basic resource to connect to the media network, usually a SdpPortManager.
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> NetworkConnection.DTMF_CONVERSION
          Contains what NetworkConnection.BASIC contains, plus a SignalDetector and a SignalGenerator for forwarding DTMFs carried by the signaling channel (advanced feature).
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> NetworkConnection.ECHO_CANCEL
          Contains what NetworkConnection.BASIC contains, plus an echo canceler feature
